text: So sad. We can't go in'cause apparently it's closed. No Texas Roadhouse for us. Huggins. Are you so sad? Go in. Are you so disappointed? It's locked. It's closed. No, no, no, no. I know it. I wanted a salad. Say, Uncle Chris, what gives? Uncle Chris. Open it. Open. Open this Texas Roadhouse. Takes it house. So sad. So sad.
